Uses of Class
com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder.PartBuilder

  • Packages that use PartBuilder 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder
    Provides classes for building resource instances.

    • Uses of PartBuilder in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder that return PartBuilder 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      PartBuilder BlobBuilder.and()
      Sets the built Blob instance as the inline data in the parent builder.
      PartBuilder FileDataBuilder.and()
      Sets the built FileData instance as the file data in the parent builder.
      PartBuilder FunctionCallBuilder.and()
      Sets the built FunctionCall instance as the function call in the parent builder.
      PartBuilder FunctionResponseBuilder.and()
      Sets the built FunctionResponse instance as the function response in the parent builder.
      PartBuilder PartBuilder.withFileData​(FileData fileData)
      Sets the file data for the part.
      PartBuilder PartBuilder.withFunctionCall​(FunctionCall functionCall)
      Sets the function call for the part.
      PartBuilder PartBuilder.withFunctionResponse​(FunctionResponse functionResponse)
      Sets the function response for the part.
      PartBuilder PartBuilder.withInlineData​(Blob inlineData)
      Sets the inline data for the part.
      PartBuilder ContentBuilder.withPart()
      Creates a new PartBuilder for building a part.
      PartBuilder PartBuilder.withText​(String text)
      Sets the inline text for the part.
      Constructors in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder with parameters of type PartBuilder 
      Constructor Description
      BlobBuilder​(PartBuilder partBuilder)
      Constructor for the BlobBuilder.
      FileDataBuilder​(PartBuilder partBuilder)
      Constructor for the FileDataBuilder.
      FunctionCallBuilder​(PartBuilder partBuilder)
      Constructor for the FunctionCallBuilder.
      FunctionResponseBuilder​(PartBuilder partBuilder)
      Constructor for the FunctionResponseBuilder.
